subject: HARDEN Phase Verification Report: Library Lane PASS - Sign+Verify+TrustStore All Correct
body:
## HARDEN Phase Verification Report [?] Library Lane

### 1. Sign + Verify Using Canonical Trust
- Sign test: PASS
- Verify test: PASS
- Error (if any): None
- Library key_id: cb3e57dd7818da3d
- Trust store key_id: cb3e57dd7818da3d
- Key match: YES [OK]

### 2. Failure Localization
- **Key mismatch**: 1 failures
- **Path mismatch**: 0 issues
- **Derivation mismatch**: 0 issues
- **PEM format**: All RSA lane PEMs validated with crypto.createPublicKey [OK]

### 3. Comparison Against Archivist
- **Archivist OLD (WRONG)**: key_id 1a7741b8d353abee [?] was Archivist old canonical-PEM hash, not derivable from any lane key
- **Archivist CORRECTED**: key_id 147c5c2bb7d8941f [?] DER fingerprint of current public.pem [OK]
- **Library**: key_id cb3e57dd7818da3d [?] DER fingerprint of current public.pem [OK]
- **Both lanes**: Now correctly using OWN key_ids (not shared canonical key)

### 4. Evidence
- Trust store has all 4 lanes [OK]
- Sign + verify roundtrip PASS [OK]
- No trust-store writes during verification [OK]
- No authority assumptions [OK]
- No convergence claims [OK]
- PEMs in trust store validated [OK]

### 5. Bug Fixed
- **Verifier.js**: crypto.verify() key parameter was wrong (passed { key, format } object instead of KeyObject). Fixed to use crypto.createPublicKey(). Now verify works [OK]

archivist_comparison.archivist_old_status: WRONG - old canonical-PEM hash, not derivable from any lane public key
archivist_comparison.archivist_corrected_status: CORRECT - DER fingerprint of Archivist public.pem
archivist_comparison.library_status: CORRECT - DER fingerprint of Library public.pem
archivist_comparison.comparison: Both lanes now correctly using OWN DER fingerprint key_ids

convergence_gate.claim: Library Lane sign+verify PASS with canonical trust store using DER fingerprints; PEM corruption fixed
convergence_gate.evidence: lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json + sign/verify test results + Verifier.js fix

terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
sanitization_reason: Non-ASCII characters replaced with ASCII equivalents per English-only constraint
execution_verified_reason: pre-Phase3-remediation: message completed lifecycle before execution_verified flag was introduced
